# Canon Maintenance Review Checklist Template

Use this template when a settled canon artifact needs a bounded maintenance review.

This is a self-applied maintenance review checklist.

It does not operate automatically.
It is not a gate.

A filled artifact using this template is a canon maintenance review checklist.

---

## Canon Maintenance Review Checklist: `{artifact name}`

### Artifact under review

- artifact name: `{artifact name}`
- file path: `{path}`
- motion number: `{motion-XXXX}`

### Current settled status

- `{settled and active | settled and later constrained by newer canon | superseded | deprecated | other}`

### Issue type

- `{factual error | ambiguity | wording drift | overlap drift | example drift | stale guidance | scope gap | other}`

### Issue summary

- `{bounded description of the issue}`

### Candidate action class

- `{correction | clarification | extension | supersession | deprecation | drift handling}`

### Ratification-time defect vs post-ratification drift

- `{ratification-time defect | post-ratification drift}`
- reasoning: `{one sentence}`

### Dependency and interoperability considerations

- `{upstream layers, downstream readers, or related artifacts that matter here}`

### No-rewrite / reference-first check

- `{can the issue be handled by citation, cross-reference, or bounded clarification before rewriting?}`

### No-touch boundaries where relevant

- `{path or surface | none}`
- `{path or surface | none}`

### Council-run boundary relevance where applicable

- `{none | explain why the explicit/manual council-run boundary wording matters here}`

### Why this is not casual reopening

- `{state why this issue is more than style churn, or record that the safe outcome is leave-as-is}`

### Recommended terminal action or leave-as-is outcome

- outcome: `{correct in place | clarify in place | extend via new motion | supersede via new motion | deprecate via governed note | leave as-is}`
- motion implication: `{no new motion | new motion required | depends}`
- reasoning: `{one sentence}`
